subject: Re: ts_template_match got nothing
body:
Hi Huy,
Are you missing peaks that were previously present in your CC volume or just peaks from the gold?
I would also check that the tomogram scale hasn’t changed even if the contents looks good
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On May 14, 2025, at 10:19, Huy Bui <huybk81@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿Hi all,
I run ts_template_match. First run working really well. Then I realized the gold particles got match a lot, so I delete the gold using fidder, regenerate the tomogram and perform ts_template_match again. Now, I have no match at all. The cc file is completely dark. The tomogram and the template look fine. 
Any idea why this doesn't work after fiducial removal?
H




--
